Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IBatteryCapability

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IObservableProperty
      • com.audiodo.aspen.IBatteryCapability
  • public class IBatteryCapability
extends IObservableProperty
    The battery capability

    This class is an interface to the battery capability available on a IDeviceService.
    It can be used to get the battery level of the remote audio device. The user of this capability will
    need to request battery level on an appropriate period. The latest level seen is available through the api.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
      protected IBatteryCapability​(long cPtr, boolean cMemoryOwn)

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods

      void delete()

      protected static long getCPtr​(IBatteryCapability obj)  
      IntVector getLevel()
      Get the latest battery level

      Get the latest battery level received from a request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventBatteryLevel()
      The event for battery level

      When the battery level has changed this event will be sent.

      This method can be used to get the string constant that notifies that
      a new battery level is available.
      To be used in the IPropertyObserver property_changed method.
      void requestBatteryLevel()
      Request a battery level update

      This method is used to request a new battery level update.
      A notification will arrive via IPropertyObserver registered in this capability
      when a new level is available.
      protected void swigSetCMemOwn​(boolean own)

        delete in class IObservableProperty

      • requestBatteryLevel

        public void requestBatteryLevel()
        Request a battery level update

        This method is used to request a new battery level update.
        A notification will arrive via IPropertyObserver registered in this capability
        when a new level is available.

      • getLevel

        public IntVector getLevel()
        Get the latest battery level

        Get the latest battery level received from a request. Request an update with
        "request_battery_level". For tws devices there will be two levels available.
        For headset devices there will be one. Each entry is an integer representing
        battery percentage level. If return value is -1, the data is not available.

        Returns:
        A vector of battery levels in percent.

      • getObservableEventBatteryLevel

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventBatteryLevel()
        The event for battery level

        When the battery level has changed this event will be sent.

        This method can be used to get the string constant that notifies that
        a new battery level is available.
        To be used in the IPropertyObserver property_changed method.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.
